prompt_text:
### Demographics: 57-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~2.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 89.2 kg; Height 183.8 cm; BMI 26.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 123/88 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.6%; 9 months ago 9.3%; 6 months ago 8.8%; 3 months ago 8.3%; current 7.1%), FPG (12 months ago 259mg/dL; 9 months ago 239mg/dL; 6 months ago 209mg/dL; 3 months ago 191mg/dL; current 141mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 86.8kg; 9 months ago 84.9kg; 6 months ago 83.9kg; 3 months ago 80.1kg; current 89.2kg), Height (12 months ago 183.8cm; 9 months ago 183.8cm; 6 months ago 183.8cm; 3 months ago 183.8cm; current 183.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 26.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 125mmHg; 9 months ago 125mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 123mmHg; current 123mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 87mmHg; 9 months ago 86mmHg; 6 months ago 86mmHg; 3 months ago 85mmHg; current 88mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 118U/L; 9 months ago 104U/L; 6 months ago 100U/L; 3 months ago 101U/L; current 115U/L), AST (12 months ago 76U/L; 9 months ago 66U/L; 6 months ago 69U/L; 3 months ago 64U/L; current 73U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 88mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 85mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 85mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 84mL/min/1.73m²; current 85mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 96mg/g; 9 months ago 93mg/g; 6 months ago 72mg/g; 3 months ago 99mg/g; current 79mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 95mg/dL; 9 months ago 100mg/dL; 6 months ago 101mg/dL; 3 months ago 95mg/dL; current 98mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 38mg/dL; 9 months ago 41mg/dL; 6 months ago 38mg/dL; 3 months ago 41mg/dL; current 39mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 127mg/dL; 9 months ago 124mg/dL; 6 months ago 143mg/dL; 3 months ago 142mg/dL; current 132mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.0g/dL; 6 months ago 14.0g/dL; 3 months ago 14.0g/dL; current 14.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
